questions.html: 1a. Wellness Wheel Balance (4 marks)

options.label: Yes, if you try hard enough it will always be perfect.
No, illness or stress will shrink dimensions, causing temporary imbalance.
Yes, wellness is a permanent state once achieved.
No, because the wheel shape is just a metaphor and doesn't matter.

options.label: They have no effect on internal wellness.
They only affect physical health (like injuries).
Stress (Intellectual) can cause anxiety (Emotional) and withdrawal (Social).
They only improve wellness, never harm it.

questions.title: 1. Nutritional Choices (4 marks)
questions.html: 1. Nutritional Choices (4 marks)

options.label: Eat a healthy breakfast every day.
Replace all meals with protein shakes.
Choose a variety of fruits and vegetables.
Eat only white foods (bread, rice, pasta).
Drink soda instead of water for energy.

source.sourceTitle: HSS 1010 | Health Services Foundations 0 Black Gold Outreach School - Black Gold Regional Schools

questions.title: 2. Physical Activity (4 marks)
questions.html: 2. Physical Activity (4 marks)

options.label: Get at least 60 minutes of activity daily.
Only exercise if you are overweight.
Include both moderate and vigorous activities.
Sit for at least 8 hours straight.

questions.html: 3. Sleep (4 marks)

options.label: Aim for 8.5 to 9.25 hours of sleep.
5 hours of sleep is plenty for teens.
Sleep is a waste of time.
Stay up all night on weekends.

Never tell the doctor the truth.
Treat all illnesses with internet advice only.

Buy whatever has the coolest commercial.

Buy the most expensive item always.
